calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.
Petitioners Yao Quan Huang and Xiu Ping Huang; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Shirley Xie.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Jiawei Huang to Ryan Jianwei Huang.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
